par_dashboard.description: This dashboard helps faculty and HOD monitor leave approvals and student attendance, and quickly identify students with low attendance.
par_dashboard.name: Faculty & HOD Dashboard

sys_update_version.name: par_dashboard_86fd1b9dc3bdb210d8d7961d050131c6
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="par_dashboard"><par_dashboard action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><base_dashboard/><certified>false</certified><description>This dashboard helps faculty and HOD monitor leave approvals and student attendance, and quickly identify students with low attendance.</description><experience display_value="Advanced Dashboards">8adc36706f01011089060168e25b3693</experience><grid>48</grid><name>Faculty & HOD Dashboard</name><sys_class_name>par_dashboard</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-12-13 06:13:13</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>86fd1b9dc3bdb210d8d7961d050131c6</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Faculty & HOD Dashboard</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Student Attendance And Leave Management" source="x_1681222_studen_0">20d43fc1c3b17210d8d7961d050131c2</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Student Attendance And Leave Management">20d43fc1c3b17210d8d7961d050131c2</sys_scope><sys_update_name>par_dashboard_86fd1b9dc3bdb210d8d7961d050131c6</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2025-12-13 06:13:14</sys_updated_on><sys_ux_app_config display_value="Advanced Dashboards">02dc36706f01011089060168e25b3691</sys_ux_app_config><sys_ux_app_route display_value="Faculty & HOD Dashboard">9efd9f9dc3bdb210d8d7961d05013140</sys_ux_app_route><sys_ux_macroponent display_value="Faculty & HOD Dashboard">42fd5f9dc3bdb210d8d7961d050131f9</sys_ux_macroponent><sys_ux_screen display_value="Faculty & HOD Dashboard default">9afd9f9dc3bdb210d8d7961d0501311a</sys_ux_screen><sys_ux_screen_type display_value="Faculty & HOD Dashboard">46fd5f9dc3bdb210d8d7961d050131f3</sys_ux_screen_type></par_dashboard></record_update>
